title: Breakwave Tanker Report 2.24.2026
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 24/02/2026
VLCC: Risk Rally or Structural Shift? - Since early February, when we observed that the VLCC market appeared to be consolidating
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2026-02-24_BreakwaveTankersFebruary242026Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2026-02-24_BreakwaveTankersFebruary242026Report.pdf

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
February 24, 2026
• VLCC: Risk Rally or Structural Shift? - Since early February, when we observed
Short-term Indicators
that the VLCC market appeared to be consolidating at elevated levels, freight rates
Momentum: Positive
have moved decisively higher, extending what was already an extraordinary rally
that began in mid-January.
